do: Use for transient operation feedback (saved, deleted, failed).
Persist error and warning toasts — never auto-dismiss them.
dont: Never use toasts for decisions or destructive confirmations — use modals.
Never auto-dismiss error or warning toasts.

example_html.error: Failed — check API key.

callout.rule: Never custom-style an alert/banner — use callout classes only. Include icon + message.

full-page-error.heading: Oops! That Wasn't Supposed to Happen
full-page-error.subtext: We ran into an unexpected issue. Try refreshing — it usually helps.
full-page-error.cta: Refresh Page button (ds-btn sz-md t-primary, onclick=location.reload())

section-error.heading: Data Retrieval Failed
section-error.subtext: We couldn't load this section. Other parts of the page are still functional.
dont: Never redirect entire page for section failure

table-empty.heading: No Data… For Now!
table-empty.subtext: No records match your current filters. Try adjusting your search.

field-error.message: ⓘ icon + specific message below field, font-size:11px, color:#dc2626
dont: Never red border without a message

selection_guide.toast: Transient feedback after an action (save, delete, export).
selection_guide.callout: Persistent inline message within a form or section.
selection_guide.full-page-error: When the entire page cannot render.
selection_guide.section-error: When one section/widget fails but page is otherwise usable.
